id: 1
name: Denny's
cuisine_type: American
description: Denny's is an iconic American diner that embodies the spirit of comfort food and nostalgia. Step inside and you're greeted by a warm, inviting atmosphere, where the aroma of sizzling bacon and freshly brewed coffee fills the air. The vibrant red and yellow decor reflects a classic diner vibe, with cozy booths and friendly staff ready to serve you 24/7. From fluffy pancakes stacked high with melted butter and syrup to hearty burgers grilled to perfection, every dish is crafted with care. Indulge in rich, creamy milkshakes or decadent desserts that take you back to childhood. Whether it’s breakfast, lunch, or dinner, Denny's is where flavor and comfort unite, creating a timeless dining experience that keeps you coming back for more.
address: Various Locations
city: San Francisco
state: CA
zip_code: 94103
phone: +1 396-904-9149
email: info@dennys.com
website: www.dennys.com
hours_of_operation: Open 24 hours
pricing_tier: 3
amenities: Free Wi-Fi, Dine-in, Takeout, Wheelchair Accessible
ambiance: Nostalgic
average_rating: None
review_count: None
